---
title: "Whiting School of Engineering Teaching Assistant Award"
date: "2024-04-01"
categories: [awards]
description: "Sole recipient across the Whiting School of Engineering for 2024."
---
I am honored to be the sole recipient of the 2024 Whiting School of Engineering (WSE) Teaching Assistant Award. This award recognizes excellence and talent as a graduate Teaching Assistant across the entire school.
